creator: martin.dieringer@gmx.de
text:
nasd of the audio/nas port segfaults for no obvious reason 
	after a few sec to 30 min with

#0  0x2811ab42 in sbrk () from /lib/libc.so.7
#1  0x2840011c in ?? ()
#2  0x28400120 in ?? ()
#3  0x28400120 in ?? ()
#4  0xbfbfc330 in ?? ()

How-To-Repeat: 	run nasd and use it (with mplayer) from remote machine
